calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-18-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Set For Trial On Jun-12-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS TEACHERS INSURANCE AND ANNUITY ASSOCIATION OF, PAMELA MCNULTY,, VIVIAN TSAI AND YVETTE HARING'S DEMURRER TO FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR HARASSMENT IN THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - Defendants' demurrer to the fourth cause of action for unlawful harassment in the first amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend. There are no cognizable harassment allegations as to any of the individual defendants. As to the TIAA, all of the cognizable harassment allegations occurred more than a year prior to plaintiff Rafael Luciano filing a complaint with the DFEH and thus all such allegations are time-barred. In his opposition memorandum Mr. Luciano states in detail what allegations he would add if he were granted leave to amend, since none of those allegations would support a harassment claim under FEHA, leave to amend is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk
